channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-7683] Interop 2.7.1<->master conf-sanity test_32b: test_32b failed with 1
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Saurabh Tandan <saurabh.tandan@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/685d829c-bac4-11e5-9137-5254006e85c2.

The sub-test test_32b failed with the following error:

test_32b failed with 1

test log:

CMD: shadow-35vm3 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests//usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/../utils:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/qt-3.3/bin:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config sh rpc.sh /usr/sbin/lctl device_list 
shadow-35vm3: mpi/openmpi-x86_64(5):ERROR:150: Module 'mpi/openmpi-x86_64' conflicts with the currently loaded module(s) 'mpi/compat-openmpi16-x86_64'
shadow-35vm3: mpi/openmpi-x86_64(5):ERROR:102: Tcl command execution failed: conflict		mpi
shadow-35vm3: 
CMD: shadow-35vm3 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests//usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/../utils:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-

CMD: shadow-35vm3 test -f /tmp/t32/sha1sums
CMD: shadow-35vm3 cat /tmp/t32/sha1sums
/tmp/t32/mnt/lustre /usr/lib64/lustre/tests
/usr/lib64/lustre/tests
CMD: shadow-35vm3 test -f /tmp/t32/list
CMD: shadow-35vm3 cat /tmp/t32/list
/tmp/t32/mnt/lustre /usr/lib64/lustre/tests
/usr/lib64/lustre/tests
CMD: shadow-35vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl conf_param t32fs-MDT0000.mdc.max_rpcs_in_flight=14
CMD: shadow-35vm2.shadow.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param 			-n mdc.*MDT0000*.max_rpcs_in_flight
CMD: shadow-35vm2.shadow.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param 			-n mdc.*MDT0000*.max_rpcs_in_flight
Waiting 90 secs for update
CMD: shadow-35vm2.shadow.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param 			-n mdc.*MDT0000*.max_rpcs_in_flight
CMD: shadow-35vm2.shadow.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param 			-n mdc.*MDT0000*.max_rpcs_in_flight
CMD: shadow-35vm2.shadow.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param 			-n mdc.*MDT0000*.max_rpcs_in_flight
CMD: shadow-35vm2.shadow.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param 			-n mdc.*MDT0000*.max_rpcs_in_flight
CMD: shadow-35vm2.shadow.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param 			-n mdc.*MDT0000*.max_rpcs_in_flight
CMD: shadow-35vm2.shadow.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param 			-n mdc.*MDT0000*.max_rpcs_in_flight
CMD: shadow-35vm2.shadow.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param 			-n mdc.*MDT0000*.max_rpcs_in_flight
CMD: shadow-35vm2.shadow.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param 			-n mdc.*MDT0000*.max_rpcs_in_flight
CMD: shadow-35vm2.shadow.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param 			-n mdc.*MDT0000*.max_rpcs_in_flight
CMD: shadow-35vm2.shadow.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param 			-n mdc.*MDT0000*.max_rpcs_in_flight
Updated after 10s: wanted '14' got '14'
CMD: shadow-35vm3 umount -d /tmp/t32/mnt/mdt
CMD: shadow-35vm3 umount -d /tmp/t32/mnt/ost
CMD: shadow-35vm3 rm -rf /tmp/t32
 conf-sanity test_32b: @@@@@@ FAIL: test_32b failed with 1
item.environment:
Server: master, build# 3303, RHEL 7
Client: 2.7.1, b2_7_fe/34
item.summary: Interop 2.7.1<->master conf-sanity test_32b: test_32b failed with 1

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
